description: Create a Simon Effect experiment in PsychoPy Builder to study reaction time differences between spatially congruent and incongruent stimuli. Participants must respond to the color of a circle stimulus (Red or Green) while ignoring its position (Left or Right). Map Red to the 'left' key and Green to the 'right' key. The experiment must utilize a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/simon_task/simon_conditions.csv containing all four combinations of colors and positions (Left: -0.5, 0; Right: 0.5, 0). Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/simon_task/simon_task.psyexp, ensuring it includes an 'instructions' routine with welcome text, a
